CHECKLIST / MODULE 8 / LESSON 7: EVERGREEN WEBINAR
EVERGREEN WEBINAR CHECKLIST
There are 6 steps to making your webinar evergreen:
1. 	Build Your Funnel
✓ 	Create all the assets: webinar, emails, ads, sales page
2. 	Prove Your Funnel
✓ 	Run ads to your webinar
✓ 	Still running the webinar live
✓ 	Generate data
✓ 	Test and refine each element of your funnel to increase profitability
✓ 	Target: 5 consecutive webinars with at least 100 attendees each with 200%
ROAS (return on ad spend)
3. 	Prove Your Recording
✓ 	Everything else stays the same, but now use a recording of your webinar
✓ 	Refine different versions of your recording
✓ 	Target: 5 consecutive webinars with 100 attendees each and 200% ROAS
4. 	Switch To Variable Times
✓ 	Everything else stays the same, but test your view times
✓ 	Include an option that starts in less than 30 minutes
✓ 	Target: Run 500 people through it, with at least 200% ROAS
5. 	Scale Your Traffic
✓ 	Everything else stays the same, but substantially increase paid traffic
✓ 	Scale slowly (+10% spending increase every 3rd day)
✓ 	Research the latest best practices for scaling ads
✓ 	Target: Ongoing 200% ROAS
6. 	Ongoing Maintenance
✓ 	Testing new traffic sources
✓ 	Test elements of funnel
✓ 	Target: Ongoing 200% ROAS
